data.name: ElevateTooltip
data.value: Relancer en tant qu'administrateur pour les opérations d'écriture sur disque

data.name: ActivityLogDescription
data.value: Retour d'opérations, avertissements et preuves de session exportées

data.name: RunAsAdminForWrite
data.value: Exécuter en tant qu'administrateur pour les opérations d'écriture

data.name: DiskHealthDescription
data.value: Examiner l'état du disque physique, la télémétrie de fiabilité et l'alignement.

data.name: DialogPartitionSizeRequired
data.value: Enter a partition size greater than 0 GB.

data.name: DialogTargetSizeRequired
data.value: Enter a target size greater than 0 GB.

data.name: DialogNewPartitionSizeRequired
data.value: Enter a new partition size greater than 0 GB.

data.name: DialogSelectDriveLetterRequired
data.value: Select an available drive letter before continuing.

data.name: DialogMergeDeleteExtends
data.value: The partition to remove will be deleted. The primary partition will be extended into the freed space when the queued operation is applied.

data.name: DialogMergeChoosePrimaryDataPartition
data.value: Choose a primary data partition that is immediately followed by another mergeable data partition.

data.name: DialogMergePrimaryAdjacentRequired
data.value: Choose a primary partition that is immediately followed by another mergeable partition.

data.name: PartitionsDescription
data.value: Sélectionnez un disque pour afficher et gérer sa disposition de partitions.

data.name: SnapshotsDescription
data.value: Examiner les dispositions de partitions enregistrées, comparer à l'état actuel et exporter les preuves de récupération.

data.name: DiskUsageDescription
data.value: Analyser un lecteur pour voir quels dossiers utilisent le plus d'espace.

data.name: SelectDrive
data.value: Sélectionnez un lecteur et cliquez sur Analyser

data.name: DiskCloningDescription
data.value: Créer des images de disque (WIM/VHDX) et les restaurer sur des disques cibles.

data.name: DiskImagesDescription
data.value: Monter, démonter et créer des images de disque virtuel.

data.name: ToolsDescription
data.value: Réparation de disque, maintenance et utilitaires de diagnostic.

data.name: Xaml_ActionsAreEnabledOnlyWhenTheRequiredDiskOrPartitionIsSelected
data.value: Actions are enabled only when the required disk or partition is selected.

data.name: Xaml_AlignmentDetailsWillAppearAfterHealthDataLoads
data.value: Alignment details will appear after health data loads.

data.name: Xaml_AnalyzeOrOptimizeHDDsAndSendRetrimToSSDBackedVolumes
data.value: Analyze or optimize HDDs, and send retrim to SSD-backed volumes.

data.name: Xaml_ApplyAWIMOrVHDXImageToATargetDiskAllDataOnTheTargetWillBeDestroyed
data.value: Apply a WIM or VHDX image to a target disk. All data on the target will be destroyed.

data.name: Xaml_AssignANewLetterToTheSelectedPartition
data.value: Assign a new letter to the selected partition.

data.name: Xaml_AssignOrChangeTheSelectedPartitionDriveLetter
data.value: Assign or change the selected partition drive letter

data.name: Xaml_CaptureAVolumeToAWIMOrVHDXFile
data.value: Capture a volume to a WIM or VHDX file.

data.name: Xaml_ChooseADriveAndScanItToRankTheLargestTopLevelFolders
data.value: Choose a drive and scan it to rank the largest top-level folders.

data.name: Xaml_ChooseASupportedTargetSizeForTheSelectedVolume
data.value: Choose a supported target size for the selected volume.

data.name: Xaml_ChooseAVolumeForFreeSpaceWipeOrADiskForFullDestructiveWipe
data.value: Choose a volume for free-space wipe or a disk for full destructive wipe.

data.name: Xaml_CompareSelectedSnapshotWithCurrentDiskLayout
data.value: Compare selected snapshot with current disk layout

data.name: Xaml_CopyEverySectorFromASourceDiskToADestinationDiskCreatesAnE_85d7e317
data.value: Copy every sector from a source disk to a destination disk. Creates an exact byte-for-byte duplicate.

data.name: Xaml_CreateADevDriveVolumeReFSWithOptimizedIOAndAntivirusFilter_d75777a5
data.value: Create a Dev Drive volume (ReFS) with optimized I/O and antivirus filter control. Requires Windows 11 23H2+.

data.name: Xaml_CreateAPartitionFromUnallocatedSpace
data.value: Create a partition from unallocated space

data.name: Xaml_CreateAVHDOrVHDXInitializeItFormatItAndMountIt
data.value: Create a VHD or VHDX, initialize it, format it, and mount it.

data.name: Xaml_DestructiveOperationsRequireConfirmationLogTheirCommandOut_3d2db885
data.value: Destructive operations require confirmation, log their command output, and refresh the partition map afterward.

data.name: Xaml_EntireDiskWipeIsDestructiveConfirmTheSelectedTargetBeforeStarting
data.value: Entire disk wipe is destructive. Confirm the selected target before starting.

data.name: Xaml_ExportAMismatchCheckedRecoveryPlanForThisSnapshot
data.value: Export a mismatch-checked recovery plan for this snapshot

data.name: Xaml_ExportARedactedDiagnosticBundleForTroubleshooting
data.value: Export a redacted diagnostic bundle for troubleshooting

data.name: Xaml_ExtendTheSelectedPartitionIntoAvailableSpace
data.value: Extend the selected partition into available space

data.name: Xaml_FormattingReplacesTheFileSystemOnThisVolumeAndRemovesItsEx_b589b663
data.value: Formatting replaces the file system on this volume and removes its existing files.

data.name: Xaml_HideOrUnhideTheSelectedPartition
data.value: Hide or unhide the selected partition

data.name: Xaml_InitializeThisUnpartitionedDiskWithAGPTPartitionTable
data.value: Initialize this unpartitioned disk with a GPT partition table

data.name: Xaml_MarkTheSelectedPartitionAsActive
data.value: Mark the selected partition as active

data.name: Xaml_MergeTwoAdjacentPartitionsIntoOne
data.value: Merge two adjacent partitions into one

data.name: Xaml_MountDismountAndCreateISOVHDAndVHDXImages
data.value: Mount, dismount, and create ISO, VHD, and VHDX images.

data.name: Xaml_MountDismountAndVHDOperationsAreBeingLogged
data.value: Mount, dismount, and VHD operations are being logged.

data.name: Xaml_MountedISOVHDAndVHDXFilesWillAppearHere
data.value: Mounted ISO, VHD, and VHDX files will appear here.

data.name: Xaml_OneWayConversionForFAT32VolumesThatNeedNTFSFeatures
data.value: One-way conversion for FAT32 volumes that need NTFS features.

data.name: Xaml_OperationsSupportedByPartitionPilotPerFilesystemTypeLimita_c6dd9bed
data.value: Operations supported by PartitionPilot per filesystem type. Limitations are imposed by Windows Storage APIs.

data.name: Xaml_OutputIsBeingCapturedInTheActivityLog
data.value: Output is being captured in the activity log.

data.name: Xaml_QueryingDisksOrApplyingTheRequestedPartitionOperation
data.value: Querying disks or applying the requested partition operation.

data.name: Xaml_ReadingPhysicalDiskSMARTAndAlignmentDetails
data.value: Reading physical disk, SMART, and alignment details.

data.name: Xaml_ReadingSavedPartitionLayoutsAndComparisonData
data.value: Reading saved partition layouts and comparison data.

data.name: Xaml_RebuildBootFilesForADetectedWindowsInstallation
data.value: Rebuild boot files for a detected Windows installation.

data.name: Xaml_RefreshToLoadPhysicalDiskSMARTReliabilityAndAlignmentDetails
data.value: Refresh to load physical disk, SMART reliability, and alignment details.

data.name: Xaml_RefreshToLoadSourceVolumesAndTargetDisksBeforeCreatingOrRe_ac385bff
data.value: Refresh to load source volumes and target disks before creating or restoring an image.

data.name: Xaml_RequiresWindows1123H2OrNewerWithDevDriveSupport
data.value: Requires Windows 11 23H2 or newer with Dev Drive support.

data.name: Xaml_RestoreWritesToTheSelectedTargetDiskAndReplacesItsContents
data.value: Restore writes to the selected target disk and replaces its contents.

data.name: Xaml_ReviewADiskLayoutBeforeCreatingResizingFormattingOrAssigningVolumes
data.value: Review a disk layout before creating, resizing, formatting, or assigning volumes.

data.name: Xaml_ReviewSavedPartitionTableSnapshotsExportEvidenceAndCopyGui_d4ae9b65
data.value: Review saved partition-table snapshots, export evidence, and copy guided recovery notes.

data.name: Xaml_RunDiskSpdSequentialAndRandomProfilesAgainstATemporaryTest_8ed7a19c
data.value: Run DiskSpd sequential and random profiles against a temporary test file, then export the evidence.

data.name: Xaml_RunNativeWindowsDiskUtilitiesWithClearerTargetingAndLoggedOutput
data.value: Run native Windows disk utilities with clearer targeting and logged output.

data.name: Xaml_ScanAVolumeForBadSectorsUsingRepairVolumeOfflineScanAndFix_b4beca22
data.value: Scan a volume for bad sectors using Repair-Volume OfflineScanAndFix. May take several minutes.

data.name: Xaml_ScanAVolumeToSeeWhichFoldersConsumeTheMostSpace
data.value: Scan a volume to see which folders consume the most space.

data.name: Xaml_ScanForFileSystemErrorsOrRunARepairModeOnTheSelectedVolume
data.value: Scan for file-system errors or run a repair mode on the selected volume.

data.name: Xaml_SectorCloneOverwritesALLDataOnTheDestinationDiskTheDestina_75f97d43
data.value: Sector clone overwrites ALL data on the destination disk. The destination must be at least as large as the source.

data.name: Xaml_SelectAnISOVHDOrVHDXFileAndMountItAsADrive
data.value: Select an ISO, VHD, or VHDX file and mount it as a drive.

data.name: Xaml_SelectTwoAdjacentPartitionsToMergeDataFromThePrimaryPartit_055a4e63
data.value: Select two adjacent partitions to merge. Data from the primary partition is preserved. The secondary partition must be empty or its data will be lost.

data.name: Xaml_ShowWhichOperationsEachFilesystemSupports
data.value: Show which operations each filesystem supports

data.name: Xaml_SMARTReliabilityDataIsNotAvailableForTheSelectedDisk
data.value: SMART reliability data is not available for the selected disk.

data.name: Xaml_SnapshotsAreSavedBeforeDestructivePartitionOperationsAndWi_1843916b
data.value: Snapshots are saved before destructive partition operations and will appear here.

data.name: Xaml_SplitTheSelectedVolumeIntoTwoVolumes
data.value: Split the selected volume into two volumes

data.name: Xaml_ThePartitionToRemoveWillBeDeletedThePrimaryPartitionWillBe_8e358bb5
data.value: The partition to remove will be deleted. The primary partition will be extended into the freed space when the queued operation is applied.

data.name: Xaml_TheWorkspaceWillPopulateAfterDiskDiscoveryCompletesOrAfter_6ed26184
data.value: The workspace will populate after disk discovery completes, or after you choose a disk.

data.name: Xaml_UseArrowKeysToInspectFoldersPressEnterOrSpaceToSelect
data.value: Use arrow keys to inspect folders. Press Enter or Space to select.

data.name: Xaml_UseAvailableUnallocatedSpaceToCreateAndFormatANewVolume
data.value: Use available unallocated space to create and format a new volume.

data.name: Xaml_UseCryptoEraseFastestRequiresSelfEncryptingDrive
data.value: Use Crypto Erase (fastest, requires self-encrypting drive)

data.name: Xaml_UseCryptoEraseInsteadOfBlockErase
data.value: Use crypto erase instead of block erase

data.name: Xaml_ValidateFirstThenConvertACompatibleSystemDiskWithoutDeleti_3693ed34
data.value: Validate first, then convert a compatible system disk without deleting partitions.
